title: Crystalz Anti Cheat
description: Anticheat for crystal pvp servers and economy servers!
body:
**CrystalzPvP Anti-Cheat: Your Essential Server Moderation Toolkit**

This plugin is the **minimum viable product** you need to effectively manage rule-breakers and suspicious activity on your Minecraft server. It's designed to give you core control over player conduct without unnecessary complexity.

**What it does:**

* **Punishment System:** Easily ban or temporarily ban players and their associated IP addresses directly from the game.
    * `/ban [username] [reason]`
    * `/tempban [username] [duration] [reason]`
    * `/banip [username] [reason]`
    * `/tempbanip [username] [duration] [reason]`
    * `/unban [username]`
    * `/check [username]` (view punishment history)

* **Suspicious Player Tracking:** Keeps a record of players flagged for cheating.
    * `/anticheat notify [player] [reason]` (manually flag a player)
    * `/sus` (opens a simple GUI showing players detected for cheating and how many times)

* **Discord Alerts:** Connects directly to your Discord server to send instant notifications about bans and detections.
    * `/setup [webhookurl]` (set up your Discord webhook)
    * `/webhookcheck` (send a test message)

* **Admin Management:** Control who has access to the plugin's powerful moderation tools.
    * `/addadmin [username]`

**In short:** It's the straightforward solution to keep your server clean, fair, and instantly alert you to problems, ensuring a better experience for everyone.
